Patch Set 1:

deploying/verifying on test cd-cas.onap.cloud cluster as part of TSC-92 - until TSC-25 full CD deploy is up - paste your own pods up, healthcheck as well

Patch Set 1:

you will need consul and msb in order for bootstrap to deploy - fyi
https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Log+Streaming+Compliance+and+API#LogStreamingComplianceandAPI-DeploymentDependencyTree-Containerlevel

Patch Set 1:

yes, the dependencies are noted under https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/dcaegen2/charts/dcae-bootstrap/templates/deployment.yaml. 

Integration team has already approved 1.3.2 image in manifest; the latest deployment on integration OOM daily using this version are successful. This OOM chart update is more for consistency.

Patch Set 1:

can you paste the kubectl results - including the secondary orchestration dep-dcae containers
